stemHtml: In aerodrome weather reports, the term "CAVOK" indicates that the visibility is…

options.a: more than 5 000 m, no significant clouds below 1 500 m/GND, no weather of significance
options.b: 10 km or more, no significant clouds below 1 500 feet/GND, no weather of significance
options.c: more than 8 km, no significant clouds below 3 000 feet/GND, no weather of significance
options.d: 10 000 m or more, no significant clouds below 5 000 feet/GND or 1 500 m/GND, no weather of significance
